---
name: Calendar Event template
about: Fill out this to create a calendar event in the code
title: Name of Event
labels: calendar-event
assignees: ''

---

### Event Name

Replace this line with your event name

### Date

Replace this line with the date of the event, including Month, Date, and Year

### Time

Replace this line with the time of the event, i.e. 12:00pm

### Location

Replace this line with the location of the event

### Organizers (use commas in between group names)

AiR Chicago, Another organization, Someone else
